creator: PagerDuty

evidence.text: This is a public version of the Incident Response process used at PagerDuty. It is also used to prepare new employees for on-call responsibilities, and provides information not only on preparing for an incident, but also what to do during and after. See the [about page](docs/about.md) for more information on what this documentation is and why it exists.

organizational_mechanism: documented incident learning and response operations
provenance: GitHub API metadata and bounded README evidence for PagerDuty/incident-response-docs.
relevance_evidence: The repository documents documented incident learning and response operations; this is an organizational operating mechanism, not generic agent-memory research.
retrieval_method: agent-reach/GitHub CLI API and README endpoint
rights_note: GitHub reports Apache-2.0; only a bounded README excerpt is retained.
